title: Westland Rose Guard RTU 800ml
description: Product Description Westland Rose Guard is a ready to use spray that controls pests, combats powdery mildew and revitalises roses. This spray poses no risk to bees or wildlife. Use all year round on roses and ornamental plants, indoors and outdoors. Controls Aphids, Whitefly, Spider Mites, Mealybugs, Scale Insect, Psyllids & Powdery Mildew. Ingredients natural plant defence Directions Instand foliar nutrition Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. If ingested, seek medical advice immediately. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat sources and direct sunlight. Do not use on edible plants or vegetables. See more
